ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E15Y — independent cross-check of E15).

Role: adversarial re-derivation of E15's instrument-card numbers from RAW artifacts only (I get artifact locations + card draft, NOT E15's method narrative). Every confirmed number must come from my own recomputation.

Inputs (cloned via APFS cp -c into ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E15Y/inputs/): watcher_eval.parquet + gate_eval.parquet + v002-20260718 probs (from _base-20260719); the E15/out raw distributions (boot_*.npy, mc_*.npy), votes_rep1..5.json, sample.json, bootstrap_distributions.csv.

Re-derivation plan (own code, own RNG seed distinct from any prior lane, B>=10000 where feasible):
1. Reproduce AUC point from probs+labels (target 0.9316896744944222).
2. Row-sampling SE n=628 (strat + unstrat) by independent bootstrap; cross-check against std of stored boot_*.npy.
3. Hanley-McNeil + DeLong analytic SE n=628 (targets 0.01029 / 0.00998).
4. Label-noise SE (flip/drop/combined) from std of stored mc_*.npy; reconstruct per-category flip rates from votes.
5. Total marginal SE (additive + jointMC) n=628 and n=1325.
6. MDE = (z0.975+z0.80)*sqrt(2)*SE_total for unpaired; *sqrt(1-rho) for paired. Both frame sizes.
7. Kappa (Fleiss is_steering/category, mean pairwise Cohen) + flip rate + frac-not-unanimous + mean pairwise disagreement + per-category flip, from votes_rep1..5.

Success criterion: CONFIRMED iff my recomputation matches every headline number within reasonable tolerance (SE/MDE within ~2-3% relative or MC-noise band; kappa/flip within rounding). PLAUSIBLE if partial. REFUTED with specifics otherwise. No LLM spend. E8: fresh clones, no shared caches. Prior lane E15X died mid-work — reference only, recompute everything.
